contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix notarization commit messages to include full signed event text (match Rails/GAS behavior)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/140
  
  Details:
  Fixed a discrepancy in notarization commit behavior between the dapp (notarize.html) and the dao_client CLI.
  
  Previously, submissions through the Python FastAPI server (the dapp path via github_upload.py) produced minimal commit messages: "Add {path} via dao_protocol" — dropping the entire signed [NOTARIZATION EVENT] payload including RSA signature, hashes, and transaction ID. The Rails server (sentiment_importer) and GAS backends correctly embedded the full event text.
  
  Root cause: the github_upload.py service in dao_protocol lacked the full-text commit message logic present in the Rails dao_controller.rb and GAS scripts.
  
  Changes:
  - Added _event_type() helper to detect event type from signed event text
  - Build commit message as "Upload {event_type} file: {path}\n\n{text}" — matching Rails/GAS behavior
  - Also fixed the existing commit b1510bf on TrueSightDAO/notarizations with a follow-up commit containing the full payload
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
